# WebSockets

## Answered Questions

- [Load Balancers and Horizontal Scaling for WebSockets](./load_balancers_horizontal_scaling_websockets.generated.md): How do load balancers and horizontal scaling affect WebSocket connections?
- [Scale a WebSocket Service to Millions of Connections](./scale_websocket_service_to_millions.generated.md): How would you scale a WebSocket service to millions of concurrent connections?
- [WebSocket Backpressure for Slow Clients](./websocket_backpressure_slow_clients.generated.md): How would you implement backpressure for a fast producer and slow WebSocket client?
